def negative_batch_api_silently_falls_back_to_single_item_semantics():
    rule_id = "batch_api_silently_falls_back_to_single_item_semantics"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs that claim batch behavior but quietly process items one by one with different semantics."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
